titleStmt.title: SII 40.1: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 1. (A.R. No. B. 294 of 1929.) Idaiyar, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District, Tamil Nadu.

summary.p: On a pillar in the ardha-maṇḍapa of the Marudiśvara temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1544, Rudhirōdgāri, Paṅguni 1.

Records the installation of the processional idols and the grant of land for providing food offerings and worship to the idols by Veligōṭi Raṅgappa-Nāyanigāru, son of Rāyappa-Nāyanigāru and grandson of Veṅkaṭappa-Nāyanigaru of Rēcharla-gōtra, when king was ruling from Ghanagiri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1544 Agunēṭi rudhirōdgāri saṁvatsara saṁ(phaṁ)guni māsaṁ 1 tēdīlu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrarāmadēva mahārāyalugāru ghanagiri nagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛthvīsāṁmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍagānu rēcarlagōtraṁ
veligōṭi veṁkaṭappanāyani pautṛlu rāmappanāyani putrulu raṁgappanāyanigāru peṁnayaḍaperumāḷaku vutsavavibhavāluṁnnupūjanaivēdyālaku mānyasaumyamuṁnnu kaṭṭaḍi śēśina kramameṭlaṁnnanunuṁnu pūrvaṁ Ī kōvilaku Utsava vigrahāluṁ ku
ḍḍagānu Utsava vigrahālu pratiṣṭhaśēyiṁci Ī kōvilaku sthānaṁgā naḍdayaḍlu kāṁḍlu bhōgātivāṁḍlanuṁnu Amarika muṁci pūja naivēdyālaku yeḍa māḍasthaḷaṁ nāḍu vārakāṁpulu karaṇālu kaccirāyaṁḍu Īśvaruṁḍi Ī Utsavaṁ guḍisthānaṁvāru kaikoḷavāṁḍu vīrala saṁmmatinidēvanēṁdala sthalamaṁduvarimaḍinēla Iruvayyāraḍugula kolanu 700 guṁṭalunnusthānaṁ vāriki pūrvaṁ
naḍacina vaiguṁṭalunnu yippuḍu kaṭṭaḍaśēśinamu [guṁṭalunnu sāhitaṁ] ṁḍaku śēvagāni 24 Aḍugulakolanu 60 guṁṭala lekhanu Āruśēvagārlakunnu 60 guṁṭalu cēnu yaṁddu varimaḍinēlanuṁnnu kaṭṭaḍi śēstimi ganaka yī dharmaṁ Ā caṁdrārkasthāyigānu pūja naivēdya mahōtsavālu Ādikēśavaperumāḷlu kānanvadhaṁ celēṭlu śēyanavadhariṁce śrī
Digital edition of SII 40.1 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
